title: Low Income/Subsidized Private Rental Housing * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Low Income/Subsidized Private Rental Housing * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions 14 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Older Adults Native American Community CASCADE MANAGEMENT INC LOW INCOME HOUSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides low-income and subsidized rental housing. 9600 SW Oak Street Suite 200 Tigard, OR 97223 Eligibility: Ages 18 and older. Some properties may only be for adults age 55 and older or those with disabilities. Hours: Varies by property Email (503) 682-7788 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DEVNW DEVNW CORVALLIS AFFORDABLE RENTALS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides affordable rental housing. There may be waitlists for units. 2525 SE Third Street Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Varies by property. Some properties may be set aside for older adults or adults with disabilities. Hours: Varies by property Email (541) 752-7220 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HOUSING AUTHORITY OF JACKSON COUNTY SUBSIDIZED AND AFFORDABLE HOUSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides subsidized housing and affordable rental unit programs. 2251 Table Rock Road Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Subsidized housing: Individuals who are 62 and older and adults with disabilities Affordable housing: Income limits and background check status varies by property. Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-noon and 1pm-4:30pm. First Thursday of the month 10am-noon and 1pm-4:30pm Email (541) 779-5785 1000 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NORTHWEST COASTAL HOUSING YAQUINA BREEZE APARTMENTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Maintains nine 1-bedroom apartments 5920 NW Gladys Street Newport, OR 97365 Eligibility: Low-income individuals earning 50% or less of the median household income, who are managing severe mental health challenges and addiction, have maintained one year of sobriety, and have been referred by Lincoln County Behavioral and Mental Health Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 574-0320 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PACIFIC RETIREMENT SERVICES INC AFFORDABLE HOUSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Manages multiple affordable senior living communities. 1 W Main Street Suite 303 Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Senior communities: Age 62 and older. Contact individual properties for income limits. Some individuals under age 62 may be eligible based on a qualifying physical disability. Hours: Central office: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Individual properties: Hours vary by site, generally Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (541) 857-7472 Get Directions Visit Website More Details QUAD INC AFFORDABLE AND ACCESSIBLE HOUSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates apartments with accommodations for independent living. Onsite 24/7 non-medical attendant care is available for residents and they receive a utility allowance. Properties available include studio, one, and two bedroom apartments. There may be waiting lists, dependent upon current unit availability. 6645 NE 78th Court Suite C7 Portland, OR 97218 Eligibility: Low-income adults with disabilities who are primarily reliant on a wheelchair for mobility. Tenants must be medically stable and able to direct their own care and manage their personal needs. Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Email (503) 287-4260 Get Directions Visit Website More Details RETIREMENT HOUSING FOUNDATION 300 MAIN Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides HUD-subsidized rental housing. The complex has 7 studios and 19 one-bedroom units, 3 of which are barrier-free for wheelchair accessibility. 300 SE Main Street Estacada, OR 97023 Eligibility: Age 62 and older and adults with disabilities who are mobility impaired Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-11:30am and 12:30pm-3:30pm Email (503) 630-2357 Get Directions Visit Website More Details RETIREMENT HOUSING FOUNDATION DESERT SAGE MANOR Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides rental units, including two units for individuals with mobility disabilities and one unit for those who are hearing impaired. An elevator is available for the upper-level units. 966 W Juniper Avenue Hermiston, OR 97838 Eligibility: Low-income adults ages 62 and older and adults with disabilities. Must meet Department of Housing and Urban Development (HUD) income requirements to qualify. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (541) 667-8607 Get Directions Visit Website More Details RETIREMENT HOUSING FOUNDATION PROVIDENCE PLACE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides subsidized housing with 66 units. Five of the units are accessible for people with mobility, hearing, or vision impairments. 3524 Fisher Road Salem, OR 97305 Eligibility: Low-income adults ages 62 and older and adults with disabilities Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 363-9640 Get Directions Visit Website More Details THE UNION MANORS KIRKLAND ANNEX HOUSING SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides subsidized rental housing. 7810 SE Foster Road Portland, OR 97206 Eligibility: -Must meet Housing and Urban Development (HUD) income requirements -Head of household or spouse must be age 62 or older or 62 and younger and need a mobility accessible apartment Hours: Monday 8am-10:30am, Thursday 2pm-4pm (503) 774-8885 Get Directions Visit Website More Details THE UNION MANORS KIRKLAND UNION household or spouse must be age 62 or older or 62 and younger and need a mobility accessible apartment Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 10am-noon and 1pm-4pm (503) 233-5671 Get Directions Visit Website More Details VIRIDIAN MANAGEMENT LOW INCOME RENTAL HOUSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a website for properties that offer affordable, low-income, and subsidized apartments. Properties may have waitlists. 200 E Main Street Enterprise, OR 97828 Eligibility: Varies by property. Must meet income guidelines. Some properties require at least one household member to be an older adult, an adult with a disability, a person with chronic mental illness, or a farm laborer.
